{

  "execution_layer_policy": {
    "agentic_lead_policy": {
      "min_subagents": 0,
      "policy": "off",
      "required_evidence_grade": "self_reported",

    "supervision_layer": "codex_plus_lead"
  },
  "expected_decisions": [],
  "expected_objections": [],
  "expected_specialists": [],
  "gate": "outcome_review",
  "instruction": "Supervisor-owned workflow gate: outcome_review.\n\nIntent:\nMake the agentic fan-out safe and resumable as a detached job. A long fan-out should run detached, survive an MCP transport drop, and resume without double-spawning workers or orphaning processes. Resolve the durable receipt hydration gap by ensuring prior worker receipts from the ledger and .handoff/agentic-workers/<task>/ are visible before produce_agentic_worker_receipts runs; partial fan-outs should reuse completed workers and spawn only missing or failed roles. Reuse S2 idempotent submit, S3a ledger terminal outcome, S5 catch_up, P13/P14 evidence verification, and Cursor review. Do not enable fan-out by default or weaken any gates.\n\nReview this gate against the current source artifacts and return a typed dual_agent_outcome.\nUse decisions/objections to say whether the gate should accept, revise, or deny.",
  "lead_skill": null,
  "outcome_validation_policy": {
    "fidelity_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "malformed_outcome": "retry_once_with_corrective_packet",
    "subprocess_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "timeout": "abort_to_operator"
  },
  "packet_schema_version": "dual-agent-handoff/v1",
